name: 18 AWG Silicone Hookup Wire
description: 18 AWG silicone-insulated stranded hookup wire, 150 strands of 0.08mm tinned copper, 2.3mm outer diameter, 0.823mm2 conductor area, 16A chassis wiring capacity, 600V rated, -60C to +200C, ultra-flexible silicone rubber insulation, available in 11+ colors

specs.availableColors: Red, Black, Blue, Yellow, Green, White, Brown, Gray, Purple, Orange, Pink

designNotes: Highest current capacity in this range. Use for motor power leads (steppers, DC motors), main power distribution, battery connections. Standard for 3D printer heated bed wiring (10-15A). Stiff but manageable. Compatible connectors: JST-XH (max), screw terminals (all sizes). Too thick for JST-PH, JST-GH, or JST-SH.. Silicone insulation is heat-resistant (200C) — ideal near hot ends, heated beds, and soldering areas. More flexible than PVC-insulated wire. Available in 25ft (as 2-color kit), 50ft, and 100ft single-color spools from BNTECHGO. Strip with automatic wire strippers set to 18 AWG.

name: 20 AWG Silicone Hookup Wire

specs.availableColors: Red, Black, Blue, Yellow, Green, White, Brown, Gray, Purple, Orange, Pink

designNotes: Good balance of current capacity and flexibility. Use for stepper motor wiring (2-3A), LED strip power feeds, 12V distribution. Standard for 3D printer stepper motor and fan wiring. Compatible connectors: JST-XH, screw terminals (all sizes). Too thick for JST-PH or smaller.. Silicone insulation is heat-resistant (200C) — ideal near hot ends, heated beds, and soldering areas. More flexible than PVC-insulated wire. Available in 25ft (as 2-color kit), 50ft, and 100ft single-color spools from BNTECHGO. Strip with automatic wire strippers set to 20 AWG.

name: 22 AWG Silicone Hookup Wire
description: 22 AWG silicone-insulated stranded hookup wire, 60 strands of 0.08mm tinned copper, 1.7mm outer diameter, 0.327mm2 conductor area, 7A chassis wiring capacity, 600V rated, -60C to +200C, ultra-flexible silicone rubber insulation, available in 11+ colors

specs.availableColors: Red, Black, Blue, Yellow, Green, White, Brown, Gray, Purple, Orange, Pink

designNotes: The general-purpose hookup wire. Suitable for most signal and moderate-power connections (sensors, control signals, low-power motors, LED strips). Fits comfortably in JST-XH and screw terminals. Most popular gauge for electronics prototyping. Compatible connectors: JST-XH (standard), 5.08mm screw terminals. At the edge of JST-PH spec.. Silicone insulation is heat-resistant (200C) — ideal near hot ends, heated beds, and soldering areas. More flexible than PVC-insulated wire. Available in 25ft (as 2-color kit), 50ft, and 100ft single-color spools from BNTECHGO. Strip with automatic wire strippers set to 22 AWG.

name: 24 AWG Silicone Hookup Wire
description: 24 AWG silicone-insulated stranded hookup wire, 40 strands of 0.08mm tinned copper, 1.6mm outer diameter, 0.205mm2 conductor area, 3.5A chassis wiring capacity, 600V rated, -60C to +200C, ultra-flexible silicone rubber insulation, available in 11+ colors

specs.availableColors: Red, Black, Blue, Yellow, Green, White, Brown, Gray, Purple, Orange, Pink

designNotes: Ideal for signal-level connections. Use with JST-PH and JST-XH connectors. Good for I2C, SPI, UART, button wiring, LED data lines. Flexible and easy to route through tight spaces. Compatible connectors: JST-PH (standard), JST-XH, all screw terminals. Standard for most JST connectors.. Silicone insulation is heat-resistant (200C) — ideal near hot ends, heated beds, and soldering areas. More flexible than PVC-insulated wire. Available in 25ft (as 2-color kit), 50ft, and 100ft single-color spools from BNTECHGO. Strip with automatic wire strippers set to 24 AWG.

name: 28 AWG Silicone Hookup Wire
description: 28 AWG silicone-insulated stranded hookup wire, 16 strands of 0.08mm tinned copper, 1.2mm outer diameter, 0.08mm2 conductor area, 1.4A chassis wiring capacity, 600V rated, -60C to +200C, ultra-flexible silicone rubber insulation, available in 11+ colors

specs.availableColors: Red, Black, Blue, Yellow, Green, White, Brown, Gray, Purple, Orange, Pink

designNotes: Finest practical hookup wire. Use with JST-SH and JST-GH connectors. For very low-current signals only — sensor data lines, I2C buses in tight spaces. Fragile — handle with care and use strain relief. Compatible connectors: JST-SH (standard), JST-GH, JST-PH. Too thin for screw terminals or power.. Silicone insulation is heat-resistant (200C) — ideal near hot ends, heated beds, and soldering areas. More flexible than PVC-insulated wire. Available in 25ft (as 2-color kit), 50ft, and 100ft single-color spools from BNTECHGO. Strip with automatic wire strippers set to 28 AWG.
